raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need command to check if inside screen. Usually check $STY variable or presence of screen in parent chain. Use ps -o ppid or pstree. Simpler: if [ -n "$STY" ]; then echo yes. But maybe also check if screen is ancestor. Use pgrep -f screen? But requirement: check if current shell is running within a 'screen' process. So command: `if [ -n "$STY" ]; then echo "inside screen"; else echo "not"; fi`. Provide single command? Maybe `[[ -n $STY ]] && echo inside || echo outside`. Provide bash command.
